summary: "Multi-chain crypto + Web3 agent toolkit untuk Hermes. Wajib digunakan kapan pun user minta operasi on-chain — buat wallet, import dari seed/private key, swap & sell token via contract address, beli/j
preconditions: Skill hermes-crypto-agent has been invoked locally
strategy: Identify the dominant trigger signals matching hermes-crypto-agent
Apply the smallest targeted change that satisfies the Skill workflow
Abort if any validation step fails
Record the outcome as a Capsule on success

_source.rationale_paper: Wang, Ren, Zhang. From Procedural Skills to Strategy Genes. arXiv:2604.15097
